sections.paragraph:
εὐθής, ές (s. τίθημι; LXX; Philo, Leg. All. 3, 309 codd.; TestAsh 1:2; Georg. Mon. 58, 21; 213, 8 deBoor [1892]; Chron. Pasch. 186, 18) by-form in H. Gk. for the adj. εὐθύς upright 1 Cl 18:10 (Ps 50:12).—DELG s.v. τίθημι.

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

TestAsh TestAsh = Testament of Asher, s. Test12Patr—List 2

Chron. Pasch. Chron. Pasch. = Chronicon Paschale, VII a.d.—List 5

  1. Gk. H. Gk. = Hellenistic Greek

adj. adj. = adjective

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 406
